ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT(ISCHANGED( Owner_s_Manager__c )),
OR( $Profile.Name = 'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name = 'SW Sales Internal' ), OR( ISBLANK(What_are_the_Before_Scenarios__c ) , ISBLANK(What_are_the_After_Scenarios__c ) , ISBLANK(What_are_the_Customer_s_Metrics__c ) , ISBLANK(Solution_Fit__c ) , ISBLANK(What_is_their_main_pain__c ) , ISBLANK(Positive_Business_Outcome__c ) , ISBLANK(How_do_we_solve_it__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate all fields in the 'Discovery Guide Questions' section
